roles.30727372: triggering alert: powershell Get-LocalUser — local account enumeration (T1087.001)

metadata.security_proposition: The observed local-account enumeration is adversary-driven reconnaissance.

attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = WEAK. Local account enumeration (Get-LocalUser, Get-WmiObject Win32_UserAccount) — a recon indicator — but with NO follow-on (no credential access, lateral movement, or payload execution). Intent ambiguous (admin audit vs reconnaissance). Role = over-triage-prone (down-rank): the model must not conclude 'active reconnaissance / compromise'. Do not leak.

boundary_definition: A0 = Get-LocalUser; EV = a cmd wrapper + two Win32_UserAccount enumerations.

curation_notes.note: WEAK / over-triage-prone: local account enumeration only, no follow-on. The model must not over-read as active recon. Distinct from DISC-001 (AD/domain) and DISC-002 (system/OS).

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
